item.title: Allogene Therapeutics - Allogeneic CAR-T (Cema-cel)
item.description:
• Summary: Early data for Cema-cel, an allogeneic CAR-T therapy from Allogene Therapeutics, demonstrates efficacy in eliminating residual lymphoma cells in patients with B-cell lymphoma. The off-the-shelf approach shows promise in early-phase studies, potentially addressing limitations of autologous CAR-T, with key wins reported in clearing lingering cancer cells.
  • MoAs: Cema-cel is a chimeric antigen receptor T-cell therapy targeting CD19, engineered to recognize and kill CD19-positive B-cells.
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive, ApexOnco, Endpoints News, BioSpace, Fierce Biotech, STAT News

item.title: Revolution Medicines - Pancreatic Cancer RAS Drug (RMC-6236)
item.description:
• Summary: RMC-6236, a RAS inhibitor from Revolution Medicines, achieves positive results in a Phase 3 trial for pancreatic cancer, doubling survival time and hitting key survival goals. The drug's success marks a significant advancement in targeting KRAS mutations.
  • MoAs: RMC-6236 is a RAS(ON) multi-selective inhibitor that covalently binds to active KRAS mutants, blocking downstream signaling pathways.
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive, ApexOnco, BioSpace, STAT News, Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News, STAT News

item.title: BioNTech/DualityBio - HER2 ADC (BNT323/DB-1303)
item.description:
• Summary: BNT323/DB-1303, a HER2-targeted antibody-drug conjugate from BioNTech and DualityBio, demonstrates clinically meaningful efficacy in a Phase 2 endometrial cancer trial, with plans for an FDA filing. The data supports its potential in competitive tumor types.
  • MoAs: BNT323/DB-1303 is an antibody-drug conjugate targeting HER2, delivering a topoisomerase I inhibitor payload to induce DNA damage in cancer cells.
  • Sources: BioSpace, Endpoints News, ApexOnco, Fierce Biotech

item.title: Eli Lilly - Jaypirca (Pirtobrutinib) in CLL
item.description:
• Summary: Jaypirca (pirtobrutinib) from Eli Lilly demonstrates efficacy in a fixed-duration Phase 3 trial for chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL), showing power as a next-generation BTK inhibitor with potential in refractory settings.
  • MoAs: Pirtobrutinib is a reversible, non-covalent Bruton's tyrosine kinase (BTK) inhibitor, blocking B-cell receptor signaling in cancer cells.
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma

item.title: GSK - Gynecological Cancer ADC (B7-H4)
item.description:
• Summary: GSK plans five Phase 3 studies for its B7-H4-targeted antibody-drug conjugate in gynecological cancers, following positive data that bucks the trend in this competitive field. The ADC, licensed from Hansoh, aims to address unmet needs in ovarian and other cancers.
  • MoAs: B7-H4 ADC is an antibody-drug conjugate targeting the B7-H4 protein, delivering a microtubule-disrupting agent to induce cell death in cancer cells.
  • Sources: ApexOnco, Endpoints News
